subject: FW: attention Jeffrey
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: laetitia simon [mailto:laetitia.simon2@gmail.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, September 11, 2007 7:03 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: attention Jeffrey


Hello Lesley,
How are you? again i'm really sorry to bother you but jeffrey isn't
calling me back. Could you transfer this new mail to him today and tell
him to call me back to discuss it...
Thank you very much.
Take care
 
Jeffrey,
 
Following my last letter i wanted to tell you that i think  i find a way
to come back to the states, enlarge my knowledge in the music business,
get an internship that could lead me to a real job offer. This option
allows me to get a student visa for 6 months as well and an legal
support to get a work visa after that. 
 
I've been looking at this school for a while and it has a good
reputation, the teachers have a great experiences in the music industry.
As i told you i'm passionate about what i do, i have the potential to
get a good position and i'm determinate to not make other mistakes. I
need a second chance to make my life right and i'm asking your help to
do this. 
 
Unfortuntly i cannot afford going to this school, my mother cannot
sponsor me cause she is in a bad financial situation. So i guess what
i'm asking you is to be my sponsor, finance me this 6 months programm
(14000$ inlcuding tution, housing and living expenses) . 
I understand this is a big financial investment and that i have to pay
you back, i'm ready to work hard to deserve that chance, i can work for
you doing anything you need me to do til April (when the second session
of courses starts), or do the fall programm that starts in october and
after i get a job i'll pay you a monthly fees out of my salary anything
is possible...But please take a look at the school (i attached all the
documentation and website) and let me know what you think. 
 
I can't tell you enough how much i need your help on this, i know that i
have asked your help a lot in the past and i might have abuse your
kindness towards me but i don't know where to turn, i made mistakes, i'm
trying to fix it but i need support. 
 
i'm avalaible anytime today to discuss with you, the only thing is that
if i want to start the fall programm in october i have to do all the
papers now so i hope you'll find a little bit of time for me. 
 
Thanks a lot Jeffrey

-- 
I dream but I don't sleep!
Laetitia Simon
++ 33 661 100 404

Hello Lesley,
How are you? again i'm really sorry to bother you but jeffrey isn't calling me back. Could you transfer this new mail to him today and tell him to call me back to discuss it...
Thank you very much.
Take care
 
Jeffrey,
 
Following my last letter i wanted to tell you that i think  i find a way to come back to the states, enlarge my knowledge in the music business, get an internship that could lead me to a real job offer. This option allows me to get a student visa for 6 months as well and an legal support to get a work visa after that.
 
I've been looking at this school for a while and it has a good reputation, the teachers have a great experiences in the music industry.
As i told you i'm passionate about what i do, i have the potential to get a good position and i'm determinate to not make other mistakes. I need a second chance to make my life right and i'm asking your help to do this.
 
Unfortuntly i cannot afford going to this school, my mother cannot sponsor me cause she is in a bad financial situation. So i guess what i'm asking you is to be my sponsor, finance me this 6 months programm (14000$ inlcuding tution, housing and living expenses) .
I understand this is a big financial investment and that i have to pay you back, i'm ready to work hard to deserve that chance, i can work for you doing anything you need me to do til April (when the second session of courses starts), or do the fall programm that starts in october and after i get a job i'll pay you a monthly fees out of my salary anything is possible...But please take a look at the school (i attached all the documentation and website) and let me know what you think.
 
I can't tell you enough how much i need your help on this, i know that i have asked your help a lot in the past and i might have abuse your kindness towards me but i don't know where to turn, i made mistakes, i'm trying to fix it but i need support.
 
i'm avalaible anytime today to discuss with you, the only thing is that if i want to start the fall programm in october i have to do all the papers now so i hope you'll find a little bit of time for me. 
 
Thanks a lot Jeffrey
